title: August 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}
'''August 18''' is the 230th day of the year (231st in leap years). There are 135 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s|1960]] – [[Paul Griffin]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Cecep Arif Rahman]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Trey King]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]] published.
*1992 – [[Dark Empire 1|''Dark Empire'' 1]], [[Dark Empire 2|2]], and [[Dark Empire 3|3]] second printings published.
*[[2004]] – [[Empire 23|''Empire'' 23]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (graphic novel)|Star Wars: The Force Unleashed graphic novel]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Abyss]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' published.
*2010 – [[Legacy (2006) 50|''Legacy'' 50]] published
*[[2014]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Dark Side]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' "[[Art Attack]]" short is uploaded on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 16|''Star Wars'' (2020) 16]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 7|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 7]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 8|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 8]] published.
*2021 – [[War of the Bounty Hunters 3|''War of the Bounty Hunters'' 3]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Visitor's Day / The Growing Green Danger]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2024]] – [[Kenneth C. Flint]] dies.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Droids Omnibus]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: A New Hope — The Manga Vol. 2]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Luke Skywalker's Galactic Adventures]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
